title: NEON OVERDRIVE
tagline: Anti-Gravity Racing Game // Environment, Art Direction, Level Design, UI // 2024
description: Neon Overdrive is a high octane, anti-gravity racing game that takes place in the near-future cyberpunk city of Cloud Medina. This game is a 2-man project with Tarik Bulut and premiered in an exhibition in the German University in Cairo. Original Soundtrack by Ahmed Fouad (MoozMusic)

title: PuppyCat's Quest
tagline: Speedrun Platforming Game // Environment, Animation, Art, Illustration, UI, Development, Level Design // 2023
description: PuppyCat's Quest is a solo game which was inspired by a Netflix original: Bee and PuppyCat. You control PuppyCat and make it through a stunning seemingly peaceful environment in this speed-run platformer. This game premiered in an exhibition at the German University in Cairo.
